title: Master of Management Studies
blurb: A general management education in the classical mould — Marketing, Finance, Operations, HR, Systems — taught by faculty who are first-name in the city's industry.
lead: The MMS is the classical general management programme of the University of Mumbai — and at MM BGIMS, it is taught as it ought to be: with seriousness, with case rigour, and with faculty who insist that students argue every position they take.
body: Five specialisations are available from the third semester onward: Marketing, Finance, Operations, Human Resources, and Information Systems. Each track is anchored by a senior faculty member with a minimum of fifteen years of industry experience.
specialisations: Marketing · Finance · Operations · Human Resources · Systems
